---
title: "UML"
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
    echo: false
---

```{r}
#| label: pkgs
#| echo: false
use("nemo", "nemo_uml")
```

```{r}
#| label: uml
# hand it over directly to knitr for rendering, cat somehow doesn't work any more
knitr::asis_output(nemo_uml(
  classes = c("Config", "Tool", "Tool1", "Workflow", "Workflow1"),
  pkg = "nemo"
))
```
